svg.title: MediTrack doctor daily workflow
svg.desc: Doctor logs in, views schedule, opens patient record, adds diagnosis and prescription, marks appointment complete, PDF generated

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the MediTrack doctor schedule page work?')
sendPrompt('What patient data does a doctor see in MediTrack?')
sendPrompt('How does MediTrack appointment status update work?')
sendPrompt('How does the MediTrack prescription form work for doctors?')
sendPrompt('How does MediTrack generate prescription PDFs?')
sendPrompt('How does MediTrack mark an appointment completed?')

svg.text: Teal = data reads | Purple = data writes | Gray = state transitions
